metadata.title: Subscriptions | Adon ERP
metadata.description: From subscription quotes and renewals to automated billing and retention workflows, Adon ERP keeps recurring revenue predictable.

hero.title: Recurring revenues.
hero.description: From subscription quotes and renewals to automated billing and retention workflows, Adon ERP keeps recurring revenue predictable.

focusSection.title: Focus on selling
focusSection.subtitle: great services
focusSection.description: Simple features to manage subscriptions automatically.
focusSection.paragraph: Concentrate on customer relationships while Adon ERP handles contract creation, automated invoices, recurring renewals, payment reminders, and plan upgrades according to your settings.

visitorsSection.title: From happy visitors to satisfied customers
visitorsSection.description: Create great long lasting relations with your subscribers.

easySignup.title: No login required and easy signup
easySignup.description: Let customers subscribe quickly without friction or long account creation steps.

userPortal.title: User-friendly portal
userPortal.description: Give subscribers a clean portal to review contracts, invoices, and renewals.

autoPayments.title: Automatic payments
autoPayments.description: Save time with automated collection, payment retries, and invoice creation.

salesForceSection.title: Get a more efficient sales force
salesForceSection.description: Save time on routine tasks and focus on growing revenue.

templates.title: Reusable templates
templates.description: Speed up sales with contract templates for your most frequent subscription scenarios.

reasonTracking.title: Smart reason tracking
reasonTracking.description: Understand why customers cancel, pause, downgrade, or renew their subscription.

focusedSales.title: Focused sales activity
focusedSales.description: Help sales teams focus on acquiring new customers and upgrading existing ones.

analysisSection.title: Analysis tools to optimize your business
analysisSection.description: Find out what metrics to act on in a click.

salesPerformance.title: Improved sales performance
salesPerformance.description: Analyze individual and team performance to improve subscription growth.

revenueAnalytics.title: Revenue analytics
revenueAnalytics.description: Track MRR, ARR, churn, upgrades, downgrades, renewals, and lifetime value.

forecasting.title: Future forecasting
forecasting.description: Forecast recurring revenue and compare growth against your targets.

autoRenewals.title: Automated renewals
autoRenewals.description: Renew contracts, invoices, and payment schedules automatically without manual tracking.

customerPortal.title: Customer portal
customerPortal.description: Let customers view plans, invoices, renewals, and payment history from a secure portal.

recurringInvoices.title: Recurring invoices
recurringInvoices.description: Generate subscription invoices based on billing cycles, plans, and contract rules.

paymentAutomation.title: Payment automation
paymentAutomation.description: Collect payments, retry failed charges, and keep customer billing updated.

revenueAnalytics.title: Revenue analytics
revenueAnalytics.description: Track MRR, ARR, churn, renewals, lifetime value, and growth opportunities.

retentionWorkflows.title: Retention workflows
retentionWorkflows.description: Trigger smart follow-ups before renewals, failed payments, or cancellation risks.

appsSection.title: One
appsSection.description: Expand subscription workflows across the Adon ERP ecosystem.

ctaSection.title: Join modern subscription teams
ctaSection.description: Teams use Adon Subscriptions to manage renewals, automate billing, and grow predictable revenue.

getStartedSection.title: Unleash
getStartedSection.subtitle: your growth potential
getStartedSection.description: Build recurring revenue workflows with automated billing, renewals, payments, and customer retention inside Adon ERP.
